data.content: Plan: update loom/work_sdlc/prompts/planning.md step 7 to explicitly recommend kno q / kno new -f / kno new -p autopilot_no_planning for implementation child knots, document the create-then-link order with kno edge add <parent> parent_of <child>, and add a short Hierarchy Gate note explaining that autopilot child knots start at planning (rank 1) and block the parent's plan_review (rank 3) transition. Regenerate loom/work_sdlc/dist/bundle.json via make loom-bundle so the runtime prompt agents see actually changes. Add a regression assertion in src/loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests.rs and a patch changeset. No child knots required; single implementation session. Hierarchy gate code in src/state_hierarchy.rs is unchanged.
